description_long: This is a weathered, rectangular outdoor air conditioning unit with a metallic, rust-streaked exterior. The front face features a large circular fan protected by a wire grille, with a faded Mitsubishi Electric logo and Japanese text above it. The top and sides show significant rust and wear, indicating prolonged exposure to the elements. One side has a series of rectangular ventilation slots, while the opposite side displays electrical access panels and conduit wiring. The rear face is dominated by a dense, black slatted grille for air intake or exhaust. The unit stands on two sturdy metal legs, elevating it slightly above the ground.
description: A rusted, rectangular outdoor air conditioner with a large front fan, side vents, and rear grille, mounted on metal legs.
description_view_0: The left side view shows vertical rectangular ventilation slots and visible rust along the edges.
description_view_1: The front view highlights the large circular fan with a wire grille and a faded Mitsubishi Electric logo.
description_view_2: The right side view displays two access panels with attached wiring and more pronounced rust streaks.
description_view_3: The rear view features a dense, black slatted grille covering most of the surface, with metal legs visible below.
attribute_brand_logo: A faded red Mitsubishi Electric logo with Japanese text is located on the upper right of the front face.
attribute_grille_pattern: The front grille is circular with concentric wire rings and radial spokes; the rear grille consists of closely spaced horizontal black slats.
attribute_control_panel_location: Right side, behind two rectangular access panels.
attribute_exhaust_vent_design: Single large rear exhaust vent with dense horizontal slats; side has vertical rectangular ventilation slots.
